code:
%%{Education_StudentDB}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
    [Education_ClassroomService] --> Pending: TodoCreated
    Pending --> InProgress: TodoStarted
    Pending --> Cancelled: TodoCancelled
    InProgress --> Completed: TodoCompleted
    InProgress --> Cancelled: TodoCancelled
    Completed --> InProgress: TodoReopened
    Cancelled --> Pending: TodoReopened
    
    state Pending {Education_GradeSync] --> NoDueDate
        NoDueDate --> DueDate: TodoDueDateSet
        DueDate --> Overdue: DueDatePassed
        DueDate --> NoDueDate: TodoDueDateRemoved
    }
    
    state InProgress {Education_ContentCDN] --> LowPriority
        LowPriority --> MediumPriority: TodoPriorityChanged
        LowPriority --> HighPriority: TodoPriorityChanged
        MediumPriority --> LowPriority: TodoPriorityChanged
        MediumPriority --> HighPriority: TodoPriorityChanged
        HighPriority --> LowPriority: TodoPriorityChanged
        HighPriority --> MediumPriority: TodoPriorityChanged
    }
    
    classDef pending fill:#FFC107,stroke:#FFA000,color:black
    classDef inprogress fill:#2196F3,stroke:#1976D2,color:white
    classDef completed fill:#4CAF50,stroke:#388E3C,color:white
    classDef cancelled fill:#9E9E9E,stroke:#616161,color:white
    
    class Pending pending
    class InProgress inprogress
    class Completed completed
    class Cancelled cancelled
repo_description: Free and Open Source ERP platform

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为学生作业系统设计一个状态流转图。核心是从ClassroomService创建待办事项开始，经历Pending、InProgress，最终到达Completed或Cancelled。
明白了，Pending是初始状态。那Pending和InProgress之间可以双向流转吗？还是单向的？
Pending可以启动进入InProgress，也可以直接取消。但InProgress不能直接回到Pending，只能通过Completed之后重新打开。另外Cancelled状态可以重新激活回Pending。
好的，主状态流转已经画好了。我注意到Pending状态内部还需要处理截止日期逻辑，InProgress内部有优先级管理，这两个子状态需要展开吗？
对，Pending里要体现GradeSync相关的截止日期设置。作业可能没有截止日期，也可能设置了之后被移除，过期了还会变成Overdue。InProgress里面则是ContentCDN的优先级动态调整，低中高之间可以互相切换。
确认一下：Pending子状态里，NoDueDate和DueDate之间通过TodoDueDateSet和TodoDueDateRemoved转换，DueDate过期触发DueDatePassed到Overdue。InProgress子状态里三个优先级两两之间都能互转，对吗？
没错。最后给四个主状态加上视觉区分：Pending用琥珀色，InProgress用蓝色，Completed用绿色，Cancelled用灰色，这样老师一眼就能看出作业整体状态。
已完成。主状态用classDef定义了四种配色方案，Pending和InProgress的子状态结构也都嵌套好了。整个图现在能清晰展示从ClassroomService创建到最终完成或取消的完整生命周期。
